name: Expense search, filters & pagination
description: Extend the expense feed with search, filters, and pagination controls. Backend: extends GET /api/v1/expenses with additional query params — query (full-text search on note field, partial-match), amount_min/amount_max, group_id, category_key, visibility (scoped to caller), sort (date|amount|created_at), and limit+cursor pagination; plus GET /api/v1/expenses/summary returning aggregated totals (sum, count) for the filtered set. Category filters use the global static catalog from feat-016, referenced by stable key rather than household-owned category records. Frontend: Filter bar component (date-range picker, category multi-select, payer select, amount range), search input, sort toggle, and pagination/infinite-scroll wiring. Per docs/product-specs/expense-querying.md. Does NOT include analytics charts (feat-028).
